case_title: SOL ROY ROSENTHAL VS. FRANC ZAMUDIO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,369.00 FILED BY ROSENTHAL, SOL ROY AS TO DEFENDANT ZAMUDIO, FRANC (AKA/ DBA "MODTIMBER") ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-22-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
